microsoft_ft: Owned a portfolio of Azure resilience initiatives end to end, driving each from problem definition through scoping, delivery, and **post-launch measurement**, standardizing workflows that sustained 45+ annual drills and drove **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise users.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform in an ambiguous, fast-moving environment, defining product requirements and self-service flows that **reduced operational toil 30%** and built return-habit usage across engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, taking full accountability for outcomes by surfacing critical defects and establishing a model for continuous validation.

Wrote clear product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for 14 cross-org executions under executive visibility, leading cross-functional execution across Engineering, Design, and Data while managing scope, timelines, and dependencies.

Drove personalization and activation patterns into planning workflows by building an internal **AI agent**, surfacing the right tools to the right users at the right moments to cut planning cycle time **39%** and increase capacity 21%.

Identified engagement gaps using qualitative research and behavioral data, partnering with Data to instrument and evaluate activation flows and define success metrics that drove continuous improvement on a $1.5B+ sovereign-cloud contract.

Identified critical feature gaps through **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, translating qualitative research and behavioral insight into a roadmap addition for intent-based YAML generation that shipped to end users.

Improved how users find and retrieve content by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time **83%** and surfacing relevant resources to the right users faster.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment with Engineering and Data on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning **140+ teams**, owning scope and dependencies end to end.

Ran structured discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours** of manual effort per region, defining the problem and building a roadmap to automate critical paths and create real operational utility at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** instrumenting operational toil across 140+ teams, defining success metrics that enabled leadership to target gaps, prioritize high-impact work, and measure outcomes post-launch.
amazon_robotics: Owned a legacy OS migration end to end, achieving **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations under tight timelines.

Led Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional teams.

pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing operations and owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, improving how users moved through the funnel.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, using behavioral data to optimize the website and Google profile and drive return visits.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocabulary: activation, retention, personalization, engagement gaps, onboarding, return visit frequency, success metrics, end-to-end ownership.
Surfaced 0→1 builder mentality and ambiguity comfort to match startup/builder preference.
Reframed B2B Azure work toward user-product framing (find, use, return) and added consumer-funnel language in Pro Painters role.
Prioritized JD nice-to-have tools (Linear, Notion, Snowflake, Fullstory, Metabase) and engagement metrics in skills.
